Our mentorship program pairs adult volunteers with young people for a year-long relationship—you'd meet with your mentee twice a month and help them grow through real conversations and shared experiences. We handle the matching process, and we cover the cost of any background check needed. It's a meaningful way to make a direct impact on a young person's life.

We match adult mentors with young people for a year-long relationship—you'd meet twice a month to support them with life skills, goals, and just being there as a trusted adult. It's called Dare to Dream, and we handle the matching and provide training so you know what to expect.

We match adults with young people for a one-year mentorship — you'd meet twice a month and really make a difference in a kid's life. It's a meaningful commitment, and we handle the background check for you (it's free). Interested in learning more or thinking about applying?

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a full year of support—you'd meet twice a month and help your mentee with life skills, goals, and just being there as a trusted adult. We handle the background check (no cost to you) and provide training, so you're never going in blind.

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a full year of support — you'd meet twice a month and help with everything from homework to life skills to just being someone they can talk to. It's a real commitment but super rewarding, and we cover the background check cost.

Mentors in our Dare to Dream program meet with their youth twice a month for a year-long commitment. It's a meaningful way to build a real relationship and make a lasting impact in a young person's life!

Mentors meet with their youth twice a month — so roughly every two weeks. It's a one-year commitment, and the flexibility is built in so you can work around both schedules.

You can donate directly on our website to fund program operations and family support — every bit helps us match more volunteers with families and youth who need mentorship. We also have other ways to give if you'd like to explore those options!
